nasb.text: So David and all the house of Israel were bringing up the ark of the Lord with shouting and the sound of the trumpet.

esv.text: So David and all the house of Israel brought up the ark of the Lord with shouting and with the sound of the horn.

cnv.text: 這樣，大衛和以色列全家，以歡呼和角聲，把耶和華的約櫃抬了上來。

ccb.text: 大卫和全体以色列人在欢呼声和号角声中把耶和华的约柜迎进大卫城。
